overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk in a Los Santos-style city. The player moves past modern commercial buildings and a Target store while neon city lights reflect off wet pavement, encountering NPC pedestrians running past.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside modern commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a modern glass building with a brick retaining wall

entered.detail: tall modern building with glass facade and purple neon lighting
low brick wall with stone cap running along the building perimeter
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting street lights and building lights
large leafy trees lining the sidewalk edge
large retail building with red circular Target logo visible on facade

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a nighttime walk along a wet urban sidewalk beside a modern commercial building with a brick retaining wall. The pavement reflects the neon city lights, and a Target store is visible in the distance on the left while trees line the left side of the path.

events.description: pedestrian in white top and patterned pants runs past the camera from behind

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as a pedestrian overtakes and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in white top running past the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible beyond the brick wall
ornate black street lamp post with glowing light

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the Target store, a female pedestrian in a white top runs past from behind. Palm trees become visible on the right side beyond the wall, and the street lamp on the left becomes more prominent while the modern glass building recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner intersection with Target store

events.description: second pedestrian in dark jacket and red pants runs past the camera

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection near the Target store as another pedestrian runs past

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket and red pants running past toward the intersection

entered.detail: street intersection with crosswalk and traffic lights ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the corner near the Target store as a second pedestrian runs past. The intersection becomes visible ahead, and the Target store facade is now prominent on the left while palm trees line the right side of the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous nighttime walk along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that leads from a modern commercial district toward a brightly lit retail intersection. It begins beside a brick retaining wall and a glass building, where neon city lights shimmer across the wet pavement and a Target store appears in the distance. As the camera advances, a female pedestrian in a white top runs past from behind, and the view shifts to reveal palm trees lining the right side of the path while a prominent street lamp illuminates the left. The scene then opens up as the camera reaches the corner, passing a second running pedestrian before the Target store facade and the open city intersection fully come into view.
